title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST TIGARD BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pediatric psychological evaluations, including Autism and ADHD assessments. Treatment available for a wide range of concerns: depression, sleep difficulties, self-esteem and self-confidence issues, family and peer relationship challenges, toileting, sleep training, and managing anxiety, fears, and worries. 7150 SW Dartmouth Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 968-3480 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 968-3480 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP. Does not offer sliding scale fees but uninsured patients may receive a 25% discount for visit if paid at time of service. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am to 5pm, Saturday/Sunday/Holidays 8am-noon by appointment Services: Bereavement and Grief Counseling * Pediatric Patients Mental Health Evaluation * Pediatric Patients Mental Health Information/Education Parenting Skills Classes Pediatric Feeding Disorders Programs Specialized Pediatric Evaluation Stress Management * Pediatric Patients Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - LACTATION SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST TIGARD
